channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Trump says US and Iran deal to end war is ‘largely negotiated’
item.description: US President Trump announced that a Memorandum of Understanding on a peace deal with Iran has been ‘largely negotiated'.

item.title: Gunman shot dead by Secret Service agents near White House: What we know
item.description: No Secret Service agents sustain injuries, but a bystander is wounded in the exchange of fire.

item.title: Rubio says ‘significant progress’ made in US-Iran negotiations
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says ‘significant progress’ made in US-Iran negotiations.

item.title: Yemen war sees scramble for scant resources between displaced and locals
item.description: Reduced aid to Yemen and a domestic economic crisis see extreme suffering among the displaced at the Maryamah camp.

item.title: Toxic gases hinder rescue efforts inside deadly China mine
item.description: Toxic gases are making it hard for rescue teams in China to reach deeper sections of a coal mine which exploded.

item.title: Russian attacks on Ukraine’s Kyiv kill at least four people
item.description: Two ​people are killed in ⁠the ​capital itself and two ⁠in the Kyiv region while 40 locations are damaged.

item.title: Suicide car bomb attack on train in Pakistan kills at least 24
item.description: The Balochistan Liberation Army has claimed responsibility for the attack.

item.title: “They don’t like each other:” Is Russia and Iran’s alliance falling apart?
item.description: Russia and Iran have been locked in a centuries-long rivalry and pragmatism.

item.title: Knicks beat Cavaliers to reach brink of NBA Finals
item.description: Brunson scores 30 points as the Knicks beat the Cavs 121-108 to take a 3-0 lead in the Eastern Conference finals.

item.title: Attacks on Ebola centres intensify in eastern DRC amid outbreak fears
item.description: Anger and mistrust growing over Ebola burials as traditions clash with medical response to prevent spread.

item.title: Man dies in northeast Australia after shark attack
item.description: The man was rushed to ⁠shore after being bitten on Sunday near ​Kennedy Shoal, but died shortly afterwards.

item.title: Usyk avoids shock defeat with 11th-round stoppage of Verhoeven
item.description: The world heavyweight champion is pushed by the former Dutch kickboxer to 11 rounds in Egypt.

item.title: ‘Want equal respect’: Pakistan’s females galloping to glory in tent pegging
item.description: More and more women and girls are making a mark in the overwhelmingly male sport, locally called 'neza baazi'.

item.title: LIVE: Trump says Iran deal ‘largely negotiated’; Pakistan says talks soon
item.description: US president makes announcement after mediator Pakistan holds 'highly productive' talks in Tehran.

item.title: 19 feared trapped after building collapse in Philippines
item.description: An unfinished nine-storey building collapsed near Manila early on Sunday, with 19 workers feared trapped

item.title: Iranian sources lay out Iran-US deal details
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Ali Hashem reveals details of Iran's position on the potential peace agreement with the US.

item.title: US Secret Service fatally shoots gunman who fired at White House checkpoint
item.description: Officers returned fire after suspect pulled weapon from bag, with a bystander also wounded.

item.title: Funerals for medics killed in Israeli air strikes in southern Lebanon
item.description: Funerals were held for paramedics killed by two Israeli air strikes in southern Lebanon on Friday.

item.title: Trump says Iran agreement ‘largely negotiated’, awaiting finalisation
item.description: US president says deal would include reopening Strait of Hormuz after call with Middle East leaders.

item.title: Violence and overcrowding hampers Ebola response in DRC
item.description: Violence and overcrowding hampers Ebola response in DRC.

item.title: India’s Gen Z ‘Cockroach Party’ is going viral
item.description: A satirical political movement called the ‘Cockroach Janta Party’ has gone viral in India.

item.title: ‘Fjord’ by Romania’s Cristian Mungiu wins Cannes top film prize
item.description: This marks the second time that Romanian director Cristian Mungiu has won the prestigious prize.

item.title: More than 1.5 million pilgrims brave fierce Mecca heat ahead of Hajj
item.description: More than 1.5 million pilgrims brave fierce Mecca heat ahead of Hajj.

item.title: Is pragmatism replacing ideology in international affairs?
item.description: Overlapping interests and conflict are shaping modern relations.

item.title: Iran move World Cup base from US to Mexico with FIFA approval
item.description: Iran were expected to fly from Turkiye to Arizona to continue World Cup 2026 preparations but will switch to Mexico.
